'''Portia''' was a dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] colonist on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]].

==History==
In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], she was a settler on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] and an excellent marksman. After the [[Battle of Fort Nowhere]] when the [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Vengeance Battle Group]] invaded the planet, she joined the group of survivors under the leadership of [[Grif Grawley]].<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

One night she was one of the six settlers who accompanied [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] in their attempt to contact the native [[Bouncer]]s. That night, they were engaged in battle against [[patrol 341]] who attacked the defensless creatures for sport. One [[skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] with a [[speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] rounded them and started shooting at the rocks; most of the group went against the troopers with Katarn, while Portia stayed behind, watching Ors's back.<ref name="JK" />

Ors had a plan and had to trust Portia's markmanship for this: while Portia remained hidden sniping, Ors climbed a rock and lit a [[flare/Legends|flare]] to lure the bike and cause it to stop to acquire a target. Portia had to wait for the right moment in order not to miss the first shot, and pulled the trigger. After seven bolts, the biker fell dead.<ref name="JK" />

==Personality and traits==
By 5 ABY Portia was a teenager. She had dark skin and intelligent eyes.<ref name="JK" />

Her seniors said she was one of the best shooters, and she kept her gun well maintained.<ref name="JK" />
